nasb.text: Jesus answered them, “To you it has been granted to know the mysteries of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been granted.

esv.text: And he answered them, “To you it has been given to know the secrets of the kingdom of heaven, but to them it has not been given.

cnv.text: 他回答：“天國的奧祕，只給你們知道，卻不給他們知道。

ccb.text: 耶稣回答说：“天国的奥秘只让你们知道，不让他们知道。

csbs.text: 耶稣回答他们，说：“天国的奥秘已经赐下来让你们知道，而没有赐给那些人；
